title: Galaxy Perfected
description: this is a project me and one of my girlfriends (leslie) have been working on. this is so far the beta. full release soon.
body:
# Galaxy Perfected:
Galaxy Perfected or GP for short, is a Vanilla+ modpack and a Space Modpack combined into an absolute **mess** of a modpack. Just to note, space is optional. So no need to go to space. I have tried to optimize it as far as possible, and hopefully it atleast **RUNS** on older hardware.

## Features:
1. Has **_lots_** of shaders. No need to use them, as they are my personal favorites.
2. Has a entire second survival path for people who want to go to space, _or people who wanna go into Creative and just_ **look** _at space._
3. It... works? I dont even know what to put here not gonna lie. Just imagine stuff here... or don´t. Your choice.

### Special Thanks:
- Leslie (for helping with the boring process, and for existing :3)
- Thanks to my family for always being there!
- And thank you! You are all so amazing!
